channel.title: RVA Burlesque
channel.description: Burlesque shows in Richmond, VA. Items are sorted by event date. Entries marked [TBD] have inferred dates pending venue confirmation.

item.title: [TBD] RVA Burlesque Bingo at Blue Bee Cider
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Friday, June 5, 2026 · 7pm – 9pm

Where: Blue Bee Cider, 4811 Bethlehem Rd, Richmond, VA 23230

Cost: $20

Recurring burlesque bingo, $20 general admission. Produced by Ellie Quinn Presents.

Recurring monthly burlesque bingo at Blue Bee. June date not yet posted; placed on first Friday based on prior cadence.

item.title: Orchard After Dark
item.description:
When: Saturday, June 6, 2026 · 8pm – 9:30pm

Where: Blue Bee Cider, 4811 Bethlehem Rd, Richmond, VA 23230

Cost: $20

Sultry, fairy-lit burlesque experience set in an enchanted orchard. 18+. Performers: Bunny Noir, Empress de Naste, Luna LaMorgue, Venessa Chevelle.

item.title: [TBD] Nerdlesque Brunch at Grandstaff & Stein
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Sunday, June 7, 2026 · 12pm – 2pm

Where: Grandstaff & Stein, 2113 E Main St, Richmond, VA 23223

Virginia's longest-running nerdlesque production. Recurring 1st Sunday brunch show by Ellie Quinn Presents.

Recurring 1st Sunday monthly per Ellie Quinn Presents. Specific date for June not yet posted.

item.title: [TBD] Pours and Pasties at Strangeways Brewing
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Saturday, June 13, 2026 · 7pm – 9pm

Where: Strangeways Brewing (Scott's Addition), 2277 Dabney Rd, Richmond, VA 23230

Recurring monthly immersive burlesque show in Scott's Addition. Check Ticketspice for the official date and tickets.

Recurring monthly immersive show. June date not yet posted on Burlesque Right Meow's Linktree; placed on a Saturday consistent with prior shows.

item.title: [TBD] Gallery5 Burlesque Night
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Saturday, June 20, 2026 · 8pm – 10pm

Where: Gallery5, 200 W Marshall St, Richmond, VA 23220

Gallery5 runs burlesque on the 3rd Saturday of each month. Theme and lineup TBA.

Inferred from Gallery5's recurring 3rd-Saturday pattern. Theme TBA.

item.title: [TBD] Burlesque Bingo at Basic City Beer
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Friday, June 26, 2026 · 7:30pm – 9:30pm

Where: Basic City Beer Co. (Southside), 212 W 6th St, Richmond, VA 23224

Recurring 4th Friday burlesque bingo by Ellie Quinn Presents.

Recurring 4th Friday monthly bingo by Ellie Quinn Presents in the Basic City game room.

item.title: [TBD] Full Moon Fest at DreamHaus
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Saturday, June 27, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: DreamHaus RVA, 110 N 18th St, Richmond, VA 23223

Cabaret series at DreamHaus, a new burlesque / circus / drag venue in Shockoe Bottom that opened December 2025.

DreamHaus runs a Full Moon Fest cabaret series; June full moon falls Jun 29. Placed on the closest Saturday.

item.title: It's Britney B*tch Burlesque
item.description:
When: Monday, July 6, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

18+ themed burlesque series at Ember Music Hall. Final scheduled date of the run.

item.description:
When: Sunday, July 12, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

10th anniversary of Ember Music Hall's Lip Sync Battle Burlesque show.

item.title: [TBD] Under The Veil at Veil Brewing
item.description:
[Tentative date — confirm with the venue before going.]

When: Saturday, July 25, 2026 · 8pm – 10pm

Where: The Veil Brewing Co. (Scott's Addition), 1509B Belleville St, Richmond, VA 23230

In-the-round floor show by Burlesque Right Meow at Veil Brewing's Scott's Addition taproom.

Recurring in-the-round series by Burlesque Right Meow at Veil Brewing. Past dates Jan 23 and Mar 27 2026 suggest an every-2-months cadence; placed accordingly.

item.title: Liver Alone: A Burlesque Reimagining of Scream
item.description:
When: Sunday, October 4, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

Burlesque reimagining of the Scream films at Ember Music Hall. Matinee and evening shows on the same day; evening time listed here.

item.title: RVA Burlesque Festival
item.description:
When: Thursday, November 5, 2026

Where: RVA Burlesque Festival (multiple venues), Richmond, VA

The major annual multi-day burlesque festival. Applications opened in spring; ticket info on the festival site.

item.title: Clothes/Off 2: Cagier & Uncaged
item.description:
When: Sunday, November 29, 2026 · 8pm – 10:30pm

Where: Ember Music Hall, 309 E Broad St, Richmond, VA 23219

Themed burlesque show at Ember Music Hall.
